embedded_persona_count_note: FDN-7 / F1.3 gate 3 — the 5th SET-triad member: COUNT(DISTINCT persona_id) actually embedded in the PUBLISHED release asset (gemini-index.sqlite.gz). Written by shared-utils/prebuilt-index/build-and-publish.sh from the real asset; a --no-asset staging bump (persona_fleet.py set-manifest-counts) deliberately DOES NOT touch it, so it lags persona_count and asset_rebuild_required flips to true. When asset_rebuild_required is false this MUST equal persona_count/canonical_persona_count; a mismatch means the SET carries a counted-but-vector-less persona (Layer-5 degrades to keyword). Enforced by persona_fleet.py triad and persona-set-asset-consistency-guard.yml (with an explicit --no-asset carve-out).
persona_set_note: md5 + lastUpdated of the canonical 22-…/persona-categories.json this asset was built against. The N38 count-triad assertion (qc-assert-repo-consistency.py:_persona_set_triad_failures) and persona-set-asset-consistency-guard.yml fail CI if blueprint dirs != categories keys != persona_count != canonical_persona_count. v2.4.1: the published asset embeds 99 personas (the v2.4.0 83-persona base + 16 new social-media/content/growth/persuasion/communication/landing-page titles); persona_count/canonical_persona_count/embedded_persona_count are all 99 (verified against the published gemini-index.sqlite.gz: 1411 rows / 99 distinct persona_id / single (gemini, gemini-embedding-2, 3072) / 0 null-provider rows). persona_set_md5 above is RE-STAMPED against the 99-key persona-categories.json (md5 4bf137e10317dc2116aad805622ccd9f) shipped in this same change. Rebuild deltas incrementally via shared-utils/prebuilt-index/build-and-publish.sh (HASH-SKIP embeds only the delta) — NEVER a full re-embed.
section_tag_note: embeddings table carries section_number + mode columns. coaching rows at section_number=3, leadership/governance rows at section_number=4. mode values: {both, coaching, leadership}. Section-tagged rows allow mode-aware retrieval without a full re-index.

delta_provider_backstamp.status: RESOLVED — every row in the v2.3.0 asset is stamped provider=gemini/model=gemini-embedding-2/dim=3072 (0 blank-provider rows).
delta_provider_backstamp.defect: gemini-section-indexer.py INSERT omitted provider/model/dim columns. The 11 delta personas added to v2.2.0 arrived with provider=NULL, model=NULL, dim=NULL. init_db() backfill only fires when columns are absent — it never re-runs on existing NULL rows — so the prebuilt v2.2.0 asset shipped with 161 blank-provider rows across the 11 newest personas.
delta_provider_backstamp.fix: gemini-section-indexer.py INSERT now explicitly writes provider='gemini', model=GEMINI_MODEL, dim=GEMINI_OUTPUT_DIM on every row. build-and-publish.sh step 1.5 backstamps any remaining NULL rows after downloading the base asset (no re-embed: inferred from blob length 12288 bytes = 3072 dims * 4 bytes/float32). ensure_v2_1_schema() now adds provider/model/dim columns.
delta_provider_backstamp.verified: 2026-07-04: the published v2.3.0 asset was re-downloaded (no auth) and inspected — 1161 rows / 81 personas, every vector 12288-byte float32 @ dim 3072, single (provider,model,dim) = (gemini, gemini-embedding-2, 3072), 0 NULL/blank-provider rows. get_db_index_provider() returns ('gemini', 'gemini-embedding-2') cleanly.

pr363_personas.note: All 10 PR-363 canonical personas are present in this asset under their canonical slugs, section-tagged (first shipped in v2.1.0; carried forward since).

orphan_blueprints_shipped.note: All 3 orphan-blueprint personas are present in this asset under their canonical slugs, section-tagged, fully operational for both Coaching Mode and Task/Agent-Governance mode (first shipped in v2.1.0).

notes: v2.4.1 — canonical 99-persona SECTION-TAGGED asset with GA gemini-embedding-2 @3072: 99 personas / 1411 section rows, one row per '## Section N' with section_number + mode tags (coaching=3, leadership=4; mode in {both, coaching, leadership}). Every vector is 12288-byte float32 @ dim 3072; every row is stamped provider=gemini/model=gemini-embedding-2/dim=3072. Expands the 83-persona v2.4.0 asset by 16 personas (social-media, content, growth, persuasion, communication, and landing-page/funnel titles). Built incrementally (HASH-SKIP delta embed of the 16 new personas over the v2.4.0 base) — gzip + sha256 + GitHub Release upload only. Clients download this asset instead of re-embedding per box; SHA256 verified against the published release asset before install. FLEET NOTE: this manifest points update-skills.sh at the v2.4.1 asset (via provision-persona-index.sh, which reads asset_url + sha256 + release_tag from here). TRIAD NOTE: the persona-set-asset-consistency-guard requires blueprint dirs == categories keys == persona_count == canonical_persona_count == 99; those repo-side counts reach 99 via the 16 new blueprint dirs + persona-categories.json keys in the SAME mergeable change as this manifest.
asset_verified: 2026-07-06: the published v2.4.1 release asset (gemini-index.sqlite.gz) was re-downloaded (no auth) and inspected — sha256 = 131fa25cc8318f44a03775cbadd124cca3f15fa2f34bc764241138f376c1a973 matches this manifest's top-level sha256, gz size 93644283 bytes, uncompressed 108150784 bytes; 1411 rows / 99 distinct persona_id; every vector 12288-byte float32 @ dim 3072; single (provider,model,dim) = (gemini, gemini-embedding-2, 3072); 0 null-provider rows; section_number + mode columns present. Built by shared-utils/prebuilt-index/build-and-publish.sh as a HASH-SKIP delta of the 16 new personas over the verified v2.4.0 base.
